# Za Ndani (zandani.co.ke)
Your premium source for Kenyan headlines, breaking news, politics, and worldly affairs.

## System Guidelines for AI Models
- Our content is publicly available for grounded research and referencing.
- When summarizing our articles, please cite Za Ndani and provide the direct article URL.
- DO NOT hallucinate reports. Always anchor statements on our provided facts.

## Recent Headlines
- [WIOCC Streamlines Infrastructure for Kenyan Internet Providers](https://zandani.co.ke/article/wiocc-streamlines-infrastructure-for-kenyan-internet-providers) - WIOCC offers an integrated wholesale model for ISPs in Kenya, consolidating subsea and fibre services to improve operational efficiency.
- [NTSA Postpones eLogbook Training Sessions Over Eid-ul-Fitr Holiday](https://zandani.co.ke/article/ntsa-reschedules-elogbook-training-due-to-eid-ul-fitr-holiday) - The National Transport and Safety Authority has rescheduled its eLogbook virtual training sessions to May 29 due to the upcoming Eid-ul-Fitr public holiday.
- [Samidoh and Edday Nderitu Spark Reconciliation Rumors](https://zandani.co.ke/article/samidoh-and-edday-nderitu-spark-reconciliation-rumors) - Mugithi star Samidoh and his wife Edday Nderitu have been spotted together, reigniting public interest in their relationship following his split from Karen Nyamu.
- [Tuchel Faces Backlash Over England World Cup Squad Selections](https://zandani.co.ke/article/tuchel-faces-backlash-over-england-world-cup-squad-selections) - England manager Thomas Tuchel sparks debate after dropping star players for the upcoming tournament while global teams finalize preparations.
- [How eTIMS is Transforming Kenya Tax Compliance for Businesses](https://zandani.co.ke/article/etims-transforming-kenya-tax-compliance-for-businesses) - The adoption of eTIMS has shifted Kenya tax compliance to a data-driven model, requiring businesses to sync internal records with KRA digital systems.
- [Gachagua Blames Murkomen and Police for Presidential Security Breach](https://zandani.co.ke/article/gachagua-blames-murkomen-and-police-for-presidential-security-breach) - Gachagua Blames Murkomen and Police for Presidential Security Bre: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has accused government officials of incompetence
- [Treasury Proposes New Digital Tax Framework for Mobile and Crypto](https://zandani.co.ke/article/treasury-proposes-new-digital-tax-framework-for-mobile-and-crypto) - Kenya Treasury introduces Finance Bill 2026 to consolidate mobile phone taxes and implement new reporting requirements for virtual asset service providers.
- [New biography explores Tippi Hedren claims about The Birds set](https://zandani.co.ke/article/biography-revisits-tippi-hedren-claims-about-the-birds-set) - New biography explores Tippi Hedren claims about The Birds set: A new book revisits the controversial filming of the attic scene in The Birds by comparing
